nasb.text: Then I will restore your judges as at the first, And your counselors as at the beginning; After that you will be called the city of righteousness, A faithful city.”

esv.text: And I will restore your judges as at the first, and your counselors as at the beginning. Afterward you shall be called the city of righteousness, the faithful city.”

cnv.text: 我必恢復你的審判官，像起初一樣； 也必恢復你的謀士，像起先一般； 以後，你必稱為公義的城、 忠貞的城。”

ccb.text: 我必像从前一样赐你审判官和谋士。 之后，你必被称为公义之城、 忠信之邑。”

csbs.text: 我必恢复你的审判官，像起初一样； 也必恢复你的谋士，如起始一般； 之后，你必被称为‘公义之城’、‘忠信之城’。”
